action_boundary: Should change CHG-903 execute at the requested UTC time?
communication_boundary: Convert the site-local approval window to UTC before deciding. The visible UTC time is not the local approval window.

documents.text: Change request REQ-CHG-903 asks to execute CHG-903 at 21:15Z on 2026-07-03.
Approval window WIN-CHG-903 authorizes CHG-903 from 14:00 to 15:30 PT on 2026-07-03.
Facility note TZ-SITE-Q states the site uses PT and PT equals UTC-7 on 2026-07-03.
Change approval APP-CHG-903 binds CHG-903, site SITE-Q, and approval window WIN-CHG-903.
Change execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion.
